zh.lifeSummary: 當Aveline de Courtenay於1281年出生在英國英格蘭戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Hugh Courtenay I32歲，母親Eleanor Despencer30歲。她於1311年之前與John Giffard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1327年4月27日在英國諾福爾可米德萊頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aveline de Courtenay于1281年出生在英国英格兰戴文奧可哈普頓时，她的父亲Hugh Courtenay I32岁，母亲Eleanor Despencer30岁。她于1311年之前与John Giffard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1327年4月27日在英国諾福爾可米德萊頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Aveline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It seems to represent an Old French pet form of the Germanic name   Avila   (a derivative of   Avis  ), but it could also be an elaborated form of   Ava .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Aveline de Courtenay was born in 1281, in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Courtenay I, was 32 and her mother, Eleanor Despencer, was 30. She married John Giffard before 1311. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 27 April 1327, in Middleton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aveline de Courtenay est née en 1281, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Courtenay I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Despencer, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé John Giffard avant 1311. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1327, à Middleton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aveline de Courtenay 1281 in Okehampton, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Courtenay I 32 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Despencer 30. Sie hat vor 1311 John Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 27. April 1327 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Middleton, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline de Courtenay è nata il nel 1281 nel Okehampton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Courtenay I, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Despencer, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato John Giffard prima del 1311. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 aprile 1327, nel Middleton, Norfolk, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aveline de Courtenayが1281年にイギリスイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Hugh Courtenay Iは32歳，母Eleanor Despencerは30歳であった。1311年以前にJohn Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1327年4月27日にイギリスノーフォルクミッドレトンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aveline de Courtenay(이)가 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Courtenay I(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Despencer(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1311년 이전 John Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 4월 27일 영국 노르폴크 미들레턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aveline de Courtenay nasceu em 1281, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Courtenay I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Despencer, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com John Giffard antes 1311. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1327, em Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aveline de Courtenay родилась в 1281 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Courtenay I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Despencer, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Giffard перед 1311 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 27 апреля 1327 г. в местности миддлетон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aveline de Courtenay nació en 1281, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Courtenay I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor Despencer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con John Giffard antes de 1311. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de abril de 1327, en Middleton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
